text:
is a serialized publication based on Evangelion franchise. It is published by DeAgostini weekly. It is intended to serialized for 100 issues, with each issue with a set price of 1,999 yen https://deagostini.jp/ev1mt . Each issue contains parts of a 1/144 scale model of Evangelion Unit-01.

Overview

Each issue will include parts of a 1/144 scale model of Evangelion Unit-01, with 555mm in total height.

The magazine also includes Mechanic Sheets, characters sheets, EVA museum and new illustrations made exclusive for the magazine.

Introductions to scenes from the film series, settei illustrations, introductions to collaborations, assembly instructions for the included parts, and a box containing the parts of each issue. The model will feature light emitting gimmick and movement features like movable entry plug. https://evacollector.com/eva-no2043-deagostini-eva01-001/
